description: The 'Eco-Friendly Sneaker' product has messy data: its 'Color' attribute was entered manually as text ('Green') instead of using the global store taxonomy, which breaks the sidebar filters. Fix this by replacing the custom text-based 'Color' attribute with the global 'Color' attribute set to 'Green'. Ensure the new attribute is visible on the product page and do not modify the 'Material' attribute, which should remain as custom text. Use the WooCommerce admin panel at http://localhost/wp-admin/.
